label: Simulation Controls
info:
Start/Stop controls for the FACIS Simulation Service.

Buttons:
- START: Scales simulation deployment to 1 replica (auto-starts ticks)
- STOP: Scales simulation deployment to 0 replicas
- STATUS: Queries simulation status via REST API

The simulation service sends tick envelopes to the 'FACIS Simulation → Kafka' flow tab.

name: Simulation Controls — Click the inject buttons to start/stop ticks
info:
START: scales the simulation pod to 1 replica, auto-sends ticks to ORCE then Kafka
STOP: scales the simulation pod to 0, ticks stop
STATUS: queries the simulation REST API

The simulation auto-starts on boot at 60x speed (1 hour of data per real minute).

name: Scale deployment

info:
